Interface AudioEngine

All Superinterfaces:
AlgorithmProvider
All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaCVEngine, VLCJEngine
public interface AudioEngine extends AlgorithmProvider
Interface definition for a generic Audio Engine. Allows switching between JavaSound, TarsosDSP, or other backends.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getAlgorithmType()
    Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
    String
    getBackendName()
    Returns the name of the backend engine (e.g., "JavaSound", "TarsosDSP").
    double
    getDuration()
    Returns the total duration in seconds.
    default String
    getName()
    Returns the human-readable name of the provider.
    default int
    getPriority()
    Returns the execution priority (higher is better).
    float[]
    getSpectrum()
    Gets the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) data for visualization.
    double
    getTime()
    Returns the current playback position in seconds.
    default boolean
    isAvailable()
    Checks if the provider is available in the current environment.
    void
    load(String path)
    Loads an audio file from a path.
    void
    pause()
    Pauses playback.
    void
    play()
    Starts or resumes playback.
    void
    stop()
    Stops playback and rewinds.

    score

  • Method Details

    • load

      void load(String path) throws Exception
      Loads an audio file from a path.
      Parameters:
      path - Absolute path or URI to the audio file.
      Throws:
      Exception - if loading fails.

    • play

      void play()
      Starts or resumes playback.

    • pause

      void pause()
      Pauses playback.

    • stop

      void stop()
      Stops playback and rewinds.

    • getTime

      double getTime()
      Returns the current playback position in seconds.

    • getDuration

      double getDuration()
      Returns the total duration in seconds.

    • getSpectrum

      float[] getSpectrum()
      Gets the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) data for visualization.
      Returns:
      array of magnitudes.

    • getBackendName

      String getBackendName()
      Returns the name of the backend engine (e.g., "JavaSound", "TarsosDSP").

    • getName

      default String getName()
      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
      Returns the human-readable name of the provider.

      Description copied from interface: AlgorithmProvider
      Returns the unique category of the algorithm.
